table.noDataDescription: Create a new device to get started.

delete.toastDescription: The device has been deleted correctly
delete.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this device?

toast.updateSuccessDescription: The device has been updated correctly
toast.createSuccessDescription: Please scan the QR code to configure the device
toast.createSuccessDescriptionKiosko: Enter subdomain and activation code in the kiosk app

info.title: Not required for devices using the CheckIO application
info.description: Information will be obtained automatically during synchronization

validation.branchRequiredDescription: For KIOSKO devices you must select a branch

markingPoint.title: What is a marking point?
markingPoint.description: A marking point is a device that allows recording employee attendance in the CheckIO system. It can be configured on:

qr.title: Device Configuration
qr.scanInstruction: Scan this QR code using the mobile application

steps.title: Steps to configure your device:
steps.step1: Download the mobile application from the app store.
steps.step2: Open the application and select the "Configure new device" option.
steps.step3: Scan the QR code shown on the left using your device's camera.
steps.step4: Follow the instructions in the application to complete the configuration.
steps.step5: Once configured, the device will be ready to use.

qr.note: Make sure to keep the QR code secure, as it contains sensitive configuration information.
qr.noteKiosko: The activation code expires in 15 minutes. Use the "Regenerate" button to generate a new one.

claimCode.label: Activation code
claimCode.instruction: Enter this code along with the subdomain in the checkio-fingerprint app

stepsKiosko.title: Steps to activate the kiosk:
stepsKiosko.step1: Open the checkio-fingerprint app on the device.
